text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Yep, looks like I've got everything! Thank you
both!

text_block_list.name: Curren & Fine
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We just wrapped up a photo shoot for a fashion
magazine. Apparently, they're doing a feature on
Beauty Anshinzawa.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan and Fine Motion both have bespoke
racewear from her, so they got picked as the
models.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I was positively impressed by how quickly you can
adapt your pose and expression!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! ♪ Back at you! I could totally tell that
you've got a lot of experience with photoshoots.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Could I ask you two for your opinion on
something? We've got a couple of options for the
outdoor shoot location, so could you tell me
which one you'd prefer?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow, they all look gorgeous!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look! I think this flower park would be lovely.
Aren't the flowers just beautiful?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Yeah, you're absolutely right, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Sounds great! The flowers make for a colorful
backdrop, so we can look forward to some nice,
vibrant photos.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Curren? Have you thought of how you'd like
to be photographed at the outdoor shoot?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've been brainstorming poses based on the
concept.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I just knew you'd already have ideas! You're
definitely the type to consider how the
background frames you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You were really paying attention to your posing
during the indoor shoot too. Did you have some
sort of theme in your head?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Kind of. My goal was to make the black shades
stand out!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
When I first saw the outfit Beauty designed for
me, I could tell that she chose all black to really
bring out my cuteness. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that to say you consider black a cutesy
color?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yup! What about you, big bro? What vibe does
black give you?
choice_data_list:
Black is striking—it can't be colored over by
someone else.

Black is flexible—it makes other colors stand
out.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yup! What about you, big sis? What vibe does
black give you?
choice_data_list:
Black is striking—it can't be colored over by
someone else.

Black is flexible—it makes other colors stand
out.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It can't be colored over... Yes, that does sound
fitting for you, Curren!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Now you'll just have to wait and see the
concept in action!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We arrive at the flower park, and shortly after,
the shoot starts with some solo shots of Curren.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
That expression is perfect! Those eyes really hit
straight in the heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren gives another pose, her motions and smile
calm—more mature than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And somehow... she makes the cutesy rural fields
blur into splashes of serene, lustrous colors
behind her.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Aaand relax! Great job, Curren. You looked really
cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's like I'm shaken out of a daze when the
photographer lowers his camera and Curren drops
the pose.
choice_data_list:
You looked so striking and unswayable, posing
in that black dress!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Black just totally gives power and
confidence, doesn't it? That's what makes it so
crazy cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Like sure, you can't color over it, but I think its
true strength comes from how black dresses up
the colors around it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Take the pink ribbon at my waist. If this were a
white dress, the pink would probably look sweet
and sugary, but the contrast with black makes it
look super classy instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing her explanation, now it makes sense why
the flowers behind her look so vivid.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Black stays true to its own style. And that's what
cuteness means to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A shade that changes the tone of everything
around her... Just like Curren's deep, unshakeable
dedication to cuteness.
choice_data_list: Black really looks perfect on you.
Black really looks perfect on you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you mean black looks adorable on me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren's detailed attention to the cute concept is
clear in the quality of her photos. They end up
being a resounding hit when the magazine hits the
shelves!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I see... It certainly does play nicely with other
colors. Just like how Curren's got a knack for
bringing out the best in everyone around her!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Now you'll just have to wait and see the
concept in action!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We arrive at the flower park, and shortly after,
the shoot starts with some shots of Curren and
Fine together.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
You both look great! The flowers really go well
with your dresses!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pair pose together. Maybe it's her dress, but
Fine Motion looks just like a fairy admiring all the
flowers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And Curren... her expression changes with each
pose. One second, she's Fine's sweet fairy
friend—the next, she's serious and elegant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The black outfit really stands out against all the
floral colors. Curren frames Fine's light green
perfectly, accentuating it without drawing
attention away from herself.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
All right, that was great! This shot would be
amazing as a two-page spread!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, looks like they got a good photo of us!
This is all thanks to your clever planning, Curren.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The black of your outfit complemented all the
pastel tones beautifully.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yup, contrast makes colors look more vivid, and
it helps outline the foreground, so your green
gown won't blend into the field.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my, you've really thought of everything! Who
knew a bit of black fabric could make such a
drastic difference.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You can never go wrong with it. I swear, it totally
goes with everything!
choice_data_list:
So it's flexible—just like how you express your
cuteness.

So it's flexible—just like how you express your
cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! ♪ But I'd say that today, it was Fine's
cuteness that really helped me shine!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You've got your own unique style, and it's
suuuper cute. It got me thinking about what I
could do to show cuteness in my own uniquely
"Curren" way.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And that's what led me to the idea of using
Beauty's black dress to highlight us and the
background. The racewear really came through
for me!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it absolutely did! It suits your style so well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, when the magazine hits the shelves, it does so with an extra two-page spread of Curren and Fine—and it's a huge hit with fans!
